What We Build

Our Specialties

Every project is engineered to complement your home and withstand Australian conditions — built once, built right.

01

Carports & Garages

Flat, gable, pitched and skillion styles to match any home. Colorbond steel, timber or aluminium — tailored to your block and aesthetic.

02

Alfresco & Patios

Extend your living outdoors with insulated panel roof systems, ceiling fans and integrated lighting — the perfect all-weather entertaining zone.

03

Decks & Timber

Hardwood and composite Ekodeck solutions with custom levels, built-in kitchens and bench seating — built to last decades with minimal maintenance.

04

Pergolas & Awnings

Classic timber pergolas to modern aluminium louvre systems — freestanding or attached, designed around your yard and lifestyle.

05

Extensions & Renovations

Full construction capability beyond outdoor structures. Structural additions, interior renovations and maintenance — handled start to finish.

06

Design & Council Approvals

We manage the entire approval process — engineering plans, council submissions and certification — so you don't navigate the paperwork alone.

Why Concept

Better Than the Rest

01

End-to-End Service

From your first call to final sign-off, we manage everything — design, permits, construction and clean-up. You don't chase anyone.

02

Council Compliance Handled

Experts in local council requirements across Sydney and the Central Coast. No surprises, no delays from paperwork.

03

Trade-Quality Craftsmanship

Every structure is built by licenced tradespeople using commercial-grade materials. We don't cut corners — ever.

04

Transparent Fixed Pricing

Fixed-price quotes with no hidden costs. What we quote is what you pay — no surprise variations at the end of the job.

05

On-Time Every Time

We schedule builds properly and communicate throughout. If something changes, you'll know before it happens.

◇

The Concept Standard

We don't just build structures — we build spaces families use every day. Our reputation is built on jobs that speak for themselves.

✓
NSW Licensed Builder — Fair Trading registered
✓
Fully insured — public liability & home warranty
✓
All work certified and fully compliant
✓
10-year structural warranty on every build
✓
Servicing Sydney & Central Coast
✓
Free measure & quote — no obligation
✓
Aftercare & maintenance support
How It Works

From Quote to
Completion

A smooth, stress-free process from first contact to the final handover. Here's what to expect when you work with Concept.

01

Free Consultation

We come to you, measure up, listen to your vision and discuss options. No pressure, no obligation — just honest advice.

→
02

Design & Quote

We prepare a detailed scope and fixed-price quote. We'll also advise on council approval requirements upfront.

→
03

Approvals & Scheduling

We handle all permits and council submissions, then lock in your build date. You're kept in the loop the whole time.

→
04

Build & Handover

Our licensed crew builds to schedule, keeps the site clean and hands over a certified, finished structure you'll love.
